name: Patient 37
history: Past labor dispute in previous workplace. Ongoing concerns about fairness, pay, and authority at work.
intermediate_belief: Management will always exploit workers if they can.
intermediate_belief_depression: The system is rigged against people like me.
coping_strategies: Cynicism, passive resistance, collective action when possible.
situation: Being asked to work beyond regular hours without additional compensation during ongoing labor dispute.
auto_thought: "Here we go again. They think our time is worthless. We have no power."
behavior: Complies reluctantly but slowly, complains to coworkers, considers union organizing.
